text:
name: liveaszan_prod

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: liveaszan
      POSTGRES_USER: liveaszan
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U liveaszan"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped

  server:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/server/Dockerfile.prod
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://liveaszan:${DB_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/liveaszan
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}
      ADMIN_EMAIL: ${ADMIN_EMAIL}
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${ADMIN_PASSWORD}
      ALADHAN_API_BASE: https://api.aladhan.com/v1
      PORT: 3001
      NODE_ENV: production
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped

  admin:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/admin/Dockerfile.prod
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    depends_on:
      - server
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  postgres_data:
